name: Microsoft E5 (full)
description: Microsoft 365 E5 with Defender for Endpoint P2, Purview Information Protection & Governance, Defender for Cloud Apps, Sentinel, and Conditional Access. The richest in-band coverage.
compensating_controls: Generic SWG/proxy block (DET-NET-001) is optional but recommended as a defense-in-depth layer at the network edge
Generic firewall API-endpoint block (DET-NET-002) is recommended for additional segmentation

things_to_know.title: Endpoint DLP requires onboarding time
things_to_know.content: Devices must be onboarded to Purview Endpoint DLP (typically via co-onboarding with Defender for Endpoint). Plan 2–4 weeks to full coverage in a typical org.

things_to_know.title: Custom Sensitive Info Types need training data
things_to_know.content: Custom SITs typically need ~30 days of training data before false-positive rates are tolerable. Plan the rollout sequence accordingly.

things_to_know.title: Audit before Block
things_to_know.content: Always run DLP in Audit mode for at least 2 weeks before enforcement. Tune based on real traffic before flipping the switch.

things_to_know.title: Approved-tool launch must precede enforcement
things_to_know.content: Users must know where they CAN take AI work before they're blocked from where they can't. Sequence: approved-tool launch comms → audit-mode detection → block-with-override → block.

policy_token_replacements.swg_tool: Defender for Cloud Apps Web Filtering (or your separate SWG)
